home.heroLead: Inkforge is infrastructure for teams that treat prompts like code — namespaces, keys, audited releases, and a path to resolve what production actually runs.
home.sectionFeaturesLead: Inspired by developer-first landing pages — clear modules, readable copy, and concrete capabilities instead of fluff.
home.feat1Body: Isolate work by namespace, iterate on drafts, freeze versions, and point environments at the channel that should resolve.
home.feat2Body: Rotate namespace keys, constrain scope, and keep programmatic access auditable alongside human sign-in through this console.
home.feat3Body: Align runtime behavior with console truth: fetch published prompts by channel, validate parameters, and render predictable templates from your services.
home.sessionLeadPrefix: Phone-backed identity for the console · details load from
home.signedOutBody: Authenticate with your phone account to hydrate session detail in this dashboard card.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Phone number and password for the console.
login.invalidPhone: Enter a valid mainland China mobile number.
login.passwordMin: Password must be at least {n} characters.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Mainland mobile and a password (minimum {n} characters).
register.invalidPhone: Enter a valid mainland China mobile number.
register.passwordMin: Password must be at least {n} characters.

nav.tooltipSoon: This entry will activate once the feature ships.

workspace.welcomeLead: After you pick a namespace in the top bar, lists and Prompt APIs stay scoped to that space.
workspace.nsCreateQuotaHelp: When unset, inherits the account/platform merge (see docs). Zero may mean unlimited depending on tier.
workspace.nsArchiveDialogMessage: Writes (new drafts, snapshots, pointer changes) stop until you restore.
workspace.nsRestoreDialogMessage: This unlocks prompts, versions, and pointer changes again. Continue?
workspace.settingsTeamHint: Team workspaces, invitations, and role-based edits are planned for Inkforge Team plans. Nothing on this screen enables shared namespaces today.
workspace.settingsIntro: Basic information for the account you are signed in with.
workspace.comingSoonBody: This area is still being wired up. Use the sidebar to return to your workspace or read the docs.
